ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_bird" TEXT /* State bird */,
  "state_flower" TEXT /* State flower */,
  "state_motto" TEXT /* State motto */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "poverty" REAL /* Percentage of population in poverty */,
  "poverty_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for poverty percentage */,
  "age" REAL /* Average age in years */,
  "age_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for age */,
  "income" REAL /* Median income in USD */,
  "income_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for income */,
  "healthcare" REAL /* Percentage of uninsured individuals */,
  "healthcare_low" REAL /* Lower bound for healthcare access percentage */,
  "healthcare_high" REAL /* Upper bound for healthcare access percentage */,
  "obesity" REAL /* Percentage of obese individuals */,
  "obesity_low" REAL /* Lower bound for obesity percentage */,
  "obesity_high" REAL /* Upper bound for obesity percentage */,
  "smokes" REAL /* Percentage of smokers */,
  "smokes_low" REAL /* Lower bound for smoking percentage */,
  "smokes_high" REAL /* Upper bound for smoking percentage */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square mile) */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in USD */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population in poverty */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in years */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate per 1,000 live births */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square mile) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "diversity_index" REAL /* Diversity index (0 to 1 scale) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Total male population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Total female population */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race or ethnic breakdown */,
  "highest_education" REAL /* Percentage of population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "home_ownership_rate" REAL /* Home ownership rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of population within this income bracket */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the income bracket */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the income bracket */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income within the bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_brackets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_brackets_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for healthcare access metrics */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "insured_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of population with health insurance */,
  "medicaid_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of population covered by Medicaid */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "public_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of public hospitals */,
  "private_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of private hospitals */,
  "emergency_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of emergency rooms */,
  "primary_care_doctors" REAL /* Number of primary care doctors per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_access_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_access_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obesity_statistics" (
  "obesity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for obesity statistics */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adults classified as obese */,
  "childhood_obesity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of children classified as obese */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "overweight_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adults classified as overweight */,
  "diabetes_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adults with diabetes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obesity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_statistics" (
  "smoking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for smoking statistics */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adults who smoke */,
  "youth_smoking_rate" REAL /* Percentage of youth who smoke */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "e_cigarette_usage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adults using e-cigarettes */,
  "secondhand_smoke_exposure_rate" REAL /* Percentage of adults exposed to secondhand smoke */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_health_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the health policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health policy */,
  "year_implemented" TEXT /* Year the policy was implemented */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the policy */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population affected by the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_health_policies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account holder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the health policy */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the state */,
  "outcome_measure" TEXT /* Measure used to evaluate the outcome */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation (e.g., improved, no change, worsened) */,
  "year_evaluated" TEXT /* Year the policy was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the evaluation result (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_effectiveness_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_effectiveness_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES state_health_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information or access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
